NIBSDescription: Cortico-cortical paired associative stimulation (ccPAS): PMv pulse then M1 pulse 8 ms later, 100 pairs at 0.2 Hz (~500 s). Delivered offline.

ElementSet.Description: Two figure-of-eight coils on independent channels. Sub-coil order maps to pulse order in pattern1 and to position_id order: pulse 1 -> Coils[0] (PMv), pulse 2 -> Coils[1] (M1).

IntensitySet.Criterion: MEP amplitude >= 50 uV in at least 5 of 10 consecutive trials
IntensitySet.MeasurementMethod: EMG MEP from right first dorsal interosseous

IntensitySet.Criterion: stimulator output evoking a ~1 mV peak-to-peak MEP
IntensitySet.MeasurementMethod: EMG MEP from right first dorsal interosseous

event_id.Description: Identifier of a stimulation event type with a unique parameter set. Linked to event_id in *_events.tsv. MUST be unique within this file.

stimulator_id.Description: Device generating the waveform. Links to StimulatorSet.StimulatorID.

element_id.Description: Element delivering stimulation. Links to ElementSet.ElementID. Here a compound coil_pair (double_coil).

stimulus_shape.Description: Waveform shape of the base stimulus.

Levels.Biphasic: Biphasic pulse as per stimulator setting

first_inflection.Description: Direction of the first deflection of the induced current.

stimulus_intensity.Description: Delivered amplitude of the base stimulus. n/a here; per-pulse values are in pattern1_intensity.

stimulus_duration.Description: Pulse width (contiguous non-zero current through the coil).

pattern1_count.Description: Number of base stimuli in one pattern1 unit (the pair).

pattern1_interval.Description: Onset-to-onset interval between the two pulses of a pair (PMv then M1).

pattern1_intensity.Description: Delivered amplitude of each pulse in the pair, in coil order (PMv, M1). Number of values equals pattern1_count.

pattern2_count.Description: Number of pattern1 units (pairs) in the full protocol.

intensity_reference.Description: Anchor used to set each pulse intensity, in coil order (PMv, M1). Links to IntensitySet.IntensityID. Closed vocabulary (rMT, aMT, 1mV, e-field, absolute).

intensity_scaling.Description: Multiplier applied to the reference value, or 'absolute'. Aligned to intensity_reference.
